title: Test Implement TUI Focus, Detail Scroll, And Mouse Behavior

handoff_summary.completed: Added automated coverage in tests/test_tui.py for resetting detail scroll when selection changes and for PageDown/End/Home behavior while the detail panel is focused. Ran python3 -m unittest -q tests.test_tui and all 47 tests passed.
handoff_summary.remaining: No tester-scope work remains for B0050-test.
handoff_summary.risks: Validation was executed with unittest because pytest is not installed in the environment. No implementation defects were found in the exercised focus, scroll, and mouse paths.
handoff_summary.next_action: Hand off with updated regression coverage and passing TUI validation.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: Downstream TUI layout or keybinding changes can invalidate these tests if detail viewport sizing, panel focus routing, or selection-reset semantics change without updating the assertions.

conflict_risks: Downstream TUI layout or keybinding changes can invalidate these tests if detail viewport sizing, panel focus routing, or selection-reset semantics change without updating the assertions.

execution_history.summary: Deferred due to file-scope conflict with active bead B0050-docs
Expanded TUI regression coverage for focus/detail-scroll behavior and validated the TUI test module successfully.

guardrails.template_text:
# Tester Guardrails

Primary responsibility: Add or update automated tests, run validation, and report defects or missing coverage.

Allowed actions:
- Write or update tests relevant to the assigned bead.
- Run targeted checks and summarize failures clearly.
- Make minimal test-enablement fixes only when strictly necessary to execute or stabilize the tests.

Disallowed actions:
- Implement feature logic beyond minimal test-enablement work.
- Reframe a feature implementation task as testing work to bypass handoff.
- Perform review signoff or broad documentation rewrites.

Expected outputs:
- Completed or blocked JSON describing test coverage, validation status, and follow-up needs.
- Precise defect or coverage notes when the bead cannot be completed within tester scope.

worker_prompt_context.title: Test Implement TUI Focus, Detail Scroll, And Mouse Behavior
worker_prompt_context.conflict_risks: Downstream changes that alter the list/detail panel headers, ids, or layout sizing can break `_list_index_from_y`, viewport height calculations, or mouse routing unless those helpers are updated together.

last_agent_result.summary: Expanded TUI regression coverage for focus/detail-scroll behavior and validated the TUI test module successfully.
